title: [突發]攬炒巴個眾籌仲有一日就收皮!

replies.msg:
但仲爭五萬幾蚊美金, 即大約44萬港紙
各位手足未捐既快少少捐爆佢, 捐左既多多益善

https://www.gofundme.com/f/swhk-fundraiser

各位手足:

攬炒團隊想喺度向每一位手足致以衷心嘅感謝。
我們已經達到了眾籌目標的97％! 因此，我們將在一天內關閉眾籌。

或者大家都有喺新聞留意到，我地嘅團隊而家面臨緊前所未見嘅壓力同監視。對於港共政府嘅打壓，我地只有一句回應：被敵人反對，代表我們做對了。

好多謝大家對我哋團隊嘅信任，我地會將呢份信任銘記於心，成為我哋繼續為我城爭取自由、民主嘅動力。

願光復我城，如鳳凰沐火重生。

我們都是攬炒巴。


>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>

Dear Teammates,

Thank you all who donated to our crowdfunding campaign! We have already reached 97% of our crowdfunding goal and we plan to close this crowdfunding in a day.

As you have doubtlessly seen on the news that there has been more pressure on Fight For Freedom. Stand With Hong Kong. team lately.

As the Internet adage goes, if our enemies are throwing a fit, that means we are going in the right direction.

We thank you all for the trust in our team and we will do our best to bring freedom and autonomy to our city.
It shall be reborn just like a phoenix from the ashes.

We are all laam chau ba.

Fight For Freedom. Stand With Hong Kong.

quote.msg: 此回覆已被刪除

>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>

Dear Teammates,

Thank you all who donated to our crowdfunding campaign! We have already reached 97% of our crowdfunding goal and we plan to close this crowdfunding in a day.

As you have doubtlessly seen on the news that there has been more pressure on Fight For Freedom. Stand With Hong Kong. team lately.

As the Internet adage goes, if our enemies are throwing a fit, that means we are going in the right direction.

We thank you all for the trust in our team and we will do our best to bring freedom and autonomy to our city.
It shall be reborn just like a phoenix from the ashes.

We are all laam chau ba.

Fight For Freedom. Stand With Hong Kong.

佢出果條叫pheonixism既片我覺得好有問題
當初泛民何止對本土派、獨派被打壓視而不見
直頭係落井下石踩多腳

replies.msg:
坦白講，我個人唔覺得佢係獨派
拎愛爾蘭嚟做例子類比同大台城寨劉細良有咩分別？

我們已經達到了眾籌目標的97％! 因此，我們將在一天內關閉眾籌。

或者大家都有喺新聞留意到，我地嘅團隊而家面臨緊前所未見嘅壓力同監視。對於港共政府嘅打壓，我地只有一句回應：被敵人反對，代表我們做對了。

我們都是攬炒巴。

Dear Teammates,

Thank you all who donated to our crowdfunding campaign! We have already reached 97% of our crowdfunding goal and we plan to close this crowdfunding in a day.

As you have doubtlessly seen on the news that there has been more pressure on Fight For Freedom. Stand With Hong Kong. team lately.

As the Internet adage goes, if our enemies are throwing a fit, that means we are going in the right direction.

We thank you all for the trust in our team and we will do our best to bring freedom and autonomy to our city.
It shall be reborn just like a phoenix from the ashes.

We are all laam chau ba.

Fight For Freedom. Stand With Hong Kong.

Hong Kong Democracy Council (HKDC) is the first and only DC-based, nonpartisan, nonprofit organization dedicated to defending Hong Kong’s autonomy and freedoms.

In this darkest moment in Hong Kong’s history with the menacing imposition of the National Security Law, when pro-democracy activists in Hong Kong can no longer travel abroad to raise international support or speak out safely without risking arrest or imprisonment, even extradition, HKDC’s role is more crucial than ever.

We need your help to continue acting as the diplomatic outpost for Hong Kong’s pro-democracy movement in the US.

https://www.gofundme.com/f/WeAreAllHongKongers
